Title: School of Magical Animals 3
Writer: Sven Unterwaldt Jr., Thorsten Näter, Viola Schmidt
Actors: Emilia Maier, Loris Sichrovsky, Emilia Pieske
Plot: Children with magical animal companions at Winterstein School experience adventures spanning a forest and fashion show, encountering a snobbish cat and vegan crocodile while navigating friendship and first love.
